title: heroes of envell zero
description: this modification is based on the famous Russian TV series Heroes of Enwell. It adds a huge living world to the game, including classes, abilities, levels, mana, and the ability to invite friends and explore this amazing world. A Gekkolib is also required.
body:
****this modification is based on the famous Russian TV series Heroes of Enwell. It adds a huge living world to the game, including classes, abilities, levels, mana, and the ability to invite friends and explore this amazing world.the thief "thief" includes two crossbows that can be fired every second, as well as abilities such as invisibility and so on,Knight"Knight" it includes a shield and a sword. It is a fairly powerful melee character. At the beginning, it only has a sword. As you level up, you will unlock the first ability,the next class is the mage, who has a staff and a tablet where you can choose abilities. The mage will have a lot of abilities, but I won't be able to tell you about them. However, you can use the staff to shoot the abilities you have chosen on the tablet,bard when you choose a bard, you will be given a guitar that you can use to shoot notes.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

 There will also be many more classes, but for now, there are only five classes in the 2.0 update. I do not plan to add any other classes except for the bard, knight, mage, engineer, and thief. The 2.0 update will be available in at least three weeks (not sure).

</details> !All abilities use mana that can be restored at checkpoints!

## HOW TO INSTALL THE MOD
this mod is currently only available on the forge, but I plan to add it to the fabric in the future. Once you have downloaded this mod, you will need to download geckolib to use it. Once you have downloaded geckolib, open the main Minecraft folder and place heroes of envell zero and geckolib in the mods folder. Then, launch the game and enjoy it.
